puzzle.title: The Ascent to the Heavens
puzzle.intro: A devoted servant of Allah was taken on a miraculous night-time passage, a journey that transcended the known limits of space and time. This soul was shown great signs and given a unique honor, solidifying a divine mission. Who is this traveler?
clues: My journey began from a sacred house of worship in the heart of my city.
I was transported in an instant to another holy sanctuary, a place of significance for many prophets before me.
I rode a creature swifter than lightning, a mount from the heavens whose every stride reached the furthest point of its sight.
From a hallowed rock, I ascended through the seven heavens, meeting my prophetic brethren along the way.
I was brought so near to the Divine Presence that the distance was but two bow-lengths or even nearer.
During this momentous ascent, the command for the five daily prayers was established as a cornerstone for my community.

location.label: What heavenly mount did I ride?
options: A ship built by Divine command

outcome.label: What was ordained during my ascent?
options: The obligation of fasting in Ramadan
The details of the Day of Judgment
The command to build the Kaaba

puzzle.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِۦ لَيْلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ إِلَى ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْأَقْصَا ٱلَّذِى بَـٰرَكْنَا حَوْلَهُۥ لِنُرِيَهُۥ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِنَآ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْبَصِيرُ
puzzle.verse: Exalted is He who took His Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] by night from al-Masjid al-Ḥarām to al-Masjid al-Aqṣā, whose surroundings We have blessed, to show him of Our signs. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Seeing. (17:1)
